Our Kuzhalappam Range

Three flavours, one promise: authentic Kerala taste, visible product quality, and a crispy bite in every pack.

Traditional Kuzhalappam

The classic Kerala favourite made with rice flour, coconut, onion, cumin, fennel, sesame seeds and salt. This variety is mildly savoury, aromatic and perfectly crunchy, making it ideal for tea-time, family gatherings and everyday snacking.

Classic Kerala TasteMild SavouryGolden Crunch

Taste profile: Light coconut aroma, subtle spice notes, and a clean crispy finish.

Sweet Kuzhalappam

A delightful sweet version of traditional Kuzhalappam, prepared with premium rice flour, coconut, sesame seeds and homemade sugar syrup. It gives the same crispy bite with a gentle sweetness loved by children and adults.

Sweet & CrispyFestival FriendlyKids Favourite

Taste profile: Mild sweetness, glossy finish, and satisfying traditional crunch.

Spicy Kuzhalappam

Made for spice lovers with a bold blend of chilli, ginger, garlic, black pepper and traditional Kerala spices. It keeps the authentic rolled shape while adding a flavourful spicy kick in every bite.

Bold SpiceKerala MasalaExtra Flavour

Taste profile: Spicy, savoury, aromatic and crunchy with a lingering Kerala-style seasoning.

About Kuzhalappam

Kuzhalappam is a traditional Kerala snack known for its rolled tube shape, crispy texture and comforting homemade taste. It is commonly enjoyed with tea and served during family visits, festive occasions and evening snack time.

At Krizpia, we keep the traditional character of Kuzhalappam while presenting it in a clean, market-ready pack. Our transparent pouch shows the real product inside, helping customers trust the quality, colour and freshness immediately.

  • Hand-rolled style with authentic Kerala flavour.
  • Prepared in small batches for better quality control.
  • Available in Traditional, Sweet and Spicy variants.
  • Best before 50 days from packing.

Why Krizpia?

Krizpia is built for customers who want a genuine Kerala snack experience with modern packaging and consistent quality. From ingredient selection to frying, cooling, checking, packing and sealing, every step is handled with care.

  • Premium ingredients: rice flour, coconut, sesame and selected spices.
  • Visible quality: real transparent pouch packing.
  • FSSAI licensed: Lic. No. 21326171000212.
  • Made in Kerala: manufactured and packed by Rangeela Products.

Actual Label Style

The website uses your real horizontal label design and your real transparent pouch packing style.

How We Make It

Traditional recipe, careful preparation and clean packing for a consistent crispy snack.

1. Ingredient SelectionPremium rice flour, coconut, sesame and spices are selected.
2. Dough PreparationIngredients are mixed to achieve the right texture and flavour.
3. Hand RollingEach piece is shaped in the traditional Kuzhalappam style.
4. FryingFried carefully until crisp, golden and flavourful.
5. CoolingSnacks are cooled properly to maintain crispiness.
6. Quality CheckingColour, texture, weight and packing quality are checked.
7. Packing & SealingPacked in transparent pouch with product label.
8. Ready for StoresPerfect for bakeries, supermarkets and local shops.

Net Quantity

160 g pack size

Allergen

Contains Sesame Seeds

Storage

Store in a cool, dry and hygienic place away from direct sunlight.

Best Before

50 days from packing
